steps.name: Launch Native Domain Query
steps.description: The attacker uses built-in net.exe commands from a Windows shell to query domain users and groups.
steps.cli:
net user /domain
net user jeffadmin /domain
net group /domain
net group "Sales Department" /domain

steps.name: Reach Domain Services
steps.description: The native query interfaces reach the corporate network path that fronts the domain directory service.

steps.name: Request Directory Data
steps.description: The Domain Controller receives the request for user and group information.

steps.name: Return User and Group Listing
steps.description: The directory service returns domain user, group, and group-membership information to the operator.
